meaning: adj.浼婃媺鍏嬬殑n.浼婃媺鍏嬩汉
examples: The money is to help create jobs and boost the Iraqi economy.
The achievement of a fair distribution of oil revenue is seen as a cornerstone of Iraqi security.
The long-delayed agreement passed the Iraqi cabinet last week and went to the parliament for reviewing.
They are leaving the sectarian conflict to the Iraqi police and focusing on the insurgency.
The Iraqi government has spent far less on rebuilding than the U.S. had predicted.
